requirements.requirement: Interactive API responses must meet the stated latency budget under expected concurrency.
requirements.rationale: Slow responses directly harm task completion and adoption.
requirements.measurement: p95 API latency < 300ms at 200 concurrent users

requirements.requirement: The system must sustain the expected request volume without queue buildup.
requirements.rationale: Peak business periods must not degrade service.

requirements.requirement: Compute utilisation should remain within headroom at peak load.
requirements.rationale: Headroom protects against spikes and controls cost.
